summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Backend Connections UI system. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Full CRUD flow verified: Open modal → Select provider → Fill credentials → Test connection → Create connection → View in list → View details → Delete connection.
critical_code_review_comments: BackendConnections.jsx is well-structured with proper state management (view, selectedProvider, connections, formData)
All 5 providers (Firebase, Supabase, REST API, GraphQL, MongoDB) have correct credential fields with proper required/optional markers
Test connection validation correctly returns error messages for missing required fields
Credentials are properly masked in the list view (shown as '***')
Modal has three views (list, add, details) with smooth navigation between them
Delete confirmation dialog prevents accidental deletions
Connection details view shows usage examples with voice commands
seed_data_creation: Created test project: f826f59a-7c25-4f1c-be0d-11860575840e (Backend Test Project)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Connections UI fully functional. Test connection endpoint is MOCKED (validates required fields but returns simulated success). All providers have correct credential forms. Modal opens from Backend button in Builder header.

backend_api_tests.test_list_providers_returns_all_five: PASS - Returns all 5 providers (firebase, supabase, rest_api, graphql, mongodb)
backend_api_tests.test_create_firebase_connection: PASS - Creates connection and verifies in list
backend_api_tests.test_connection_firebase_missing_api_key: PASS - Returns success=false with error message

frontend_ui_tests.backend_button_in_builder: PASS - Button visible in Builder header
frontend_ui_tests.all_five_providers_visible: PASS - Firebase, Supabase, REST API, GraphQL, MongoDB all visible
frontend_ui_tests.provider_selection_shows_form: PASS - Clicking provider shows credential form
frontend_ui_tests.test_connection_with_missing_fields: PASS - Shows 'Missing required fields: api_key, project_id'
frontend_ui_tests.create_connection_adds_to_list: PASS - Connection appears in Active Connections

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/backend/connections/test - Validates required fields per provider but returns simulated success (doesn't actually connect to Firebase/Supabase/etc.)
mocked_status.note: Test connection endpoint validates credential structure but doesn't make real connections to external services
